Appearances:
Plaintiff Paul Baastad, is present.
Attorney, Richard Grabstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Julia Tennyson, is present.
Attorney, Nathaniel Torres , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of NOV-15-2010 remains on calendar.
